# Worldclass ERP Software - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a comprehensive ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system built with modern technologies.

## Technology Stack
- **Backend**: Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js
- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Vite
- **Database**: PostgreSQL
- **Architecture**: Monorepo with microservices-ready design

## ERP Modules
1. Inventory Management
2. Sales & CRM
3. Purchase Management
4. Financial Accounting
5. HR & Payroll
6. Manufacturing
7. Warehouse Management

## Setup Progress
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file

- [ ] Scaffold frontend project structure

- [ ] Create README documentation

## Development Guidelines
- Follow TypeScript best practices
- Use RESTful API design patterns
- Implement proper error handling
- Write unit and integration tests
- Follow modular architecture for scalability
